blended.narrative: Kirkwood is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Mild temps with highs near 55°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 4" over the past week. Current depth: 52".
